channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models
item.description: LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models

item.title: [Simon Willison] Quoting Thibault Sottiaux
item.description: Quoting Thibault Sottiaux

item.title: [Hacker News] German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks
item.description: German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks

item.title: [Hacker News] Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with “Classical” Machine Learning
item.description: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with “Classical” Machine Learning

item.title: [Hacker News] NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook
item.description: NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook

item.title: [OpenAI] Why teens deserve access to safe AI
item.description: Why teens deserve access to safe AI

item.title: [Simon Willison] Mermaid to ASCII art (mermaid-ascii)
item.description: Mermaid to ASCII art (mermaid-ascii)

item.title: [Latent Space] 🔬 The Lab of the Future Should Feel Like a Data Center — Andy Beam & Rafa Gómez-Bombarelli, Lila Sciences
item.description: 🔬 The Lab of the Future Should Feel Like a Data Center — Andy Beam & Rafa Gómez-Bombarelli, Lila Sciences

item.title: [Hacker News] SpaceX stock erases all its gains and slides below IPO price in intraday trading
item.description: SpaceX stock erases all its gains and slides below IPO price in intraday trading

item.title: [Hacker News] The LLM Critics Are Right. I Use LLMs Anyway
item.description: The LLM Critics Are Right. I Use LLMs Anyway

item.title: [GitHub Trending] apache/ossie — Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
item.description: Apache Ossie standardizes semantic metadata exchange across analytics, AI, and BI platforms with vendor-neutral specifications.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] PostHog/posthog — 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
item.description: PostHog offers an integrated developer platform with analytics, error tracking, feature flags, experiments, surveys, and AI-powered debugging capabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] PrismML-Eng/Bonsai-demo — Bonsai Demo
item.description: PrismML-Eng's Bonsai Demo repository appeared on GitHub Trending.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/lobehub — 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.
item.description: LobeHub is a platform for organizing and managing AI agents with scheduling and reporting capabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] github/copilot-sdk — Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services
item.description: GitHub released a multi-platform SDK enabling developers to integrate GitHub Copilot Agent into applications and services.

item.title: [Google DeepMind] Our approach to bioresilience
item.description: Our approach to bioresilience

item.title: [Hacker News] Where are YC founders now? OpenAI and Anthropic, mostly
item.description: Where are YC founders now? OpenAI and Anthropic, mostly

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
item.description: [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FixItFlow: Automated Troubleshooting Guide Generation from Cloud Incidents
item.description: FixItFlow generates troubleshooting guides from cloud incidents using LLMs, reducing mitigation time 2.3x with 61.5% positive user ratings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ask Before You Diagnose: Safe-Psych, a Sequential Evaluation Benchmark for LLMs in Psychiatry
item.description: Safe-Psych benchmark reveals LLMs struggle with incomplete clinical information in psychiatry, prematurely diagnosing without sufficient evidence and rarely seeking clarification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Perplexity Trap: When Patent Law Makes Human Writing Look Like AI
item.description: EPO's 2026 patent guidelines require LLM detection, but AI detectors fail with 60%+ false positives because human patent writing mirrors LLM output patterns.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do LLMs Need Architectural Changes for Simultaneous Speech Translation? A Prefix-to-Prefix Data Driven Approach
item.description: Researchers propose prefix-to-prefix data-driven approach for simultaneous speech translation in LLMs, achieving improved quality without architectural modifications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What Models Express, Suppress, and Resist: Auditing Open-Weight LLMs with Persona Vectors
item.description: Researchers use persona vectors to systematically probe 53 behavioral traits in open-weight LLMs, revealing which behaviors are naturally expressed, steerably latent, or resistant to extraction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Text2Sign: A Single-GPU Diffusion Baseline for Text-to-Sign Language Video Generation
item.description: Text2Sign generates sign language video from text using a diffusion model that runs on a single NVIDIA L4 GPU.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RAGthoven at SemEval-2026 Task 1: A Multi-Stage Pipeline Walks Into a Benchmark and Barely Clears the Bar
item.description: RAGthoven, a multi-stage LLM pipeline with RAG-augmented humor generation, ties with Gemini 2.5 Flash baseline on SemEval-2026 multilingual humor task.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache: Diagnosing and Correcting Structural-Role Bias in LLM Inference
item.description: Study identifies and addresses structural-role bias in KV cache eviction for long-context LLMs, proposing a role-conditional filtering method that improves accuracy on schema-dense inputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GSM-Plus-BN: A Perturbation-Based Benchmark for Bangla Mathematical Reasoning in Large Language Models
item.description: GSM-Plus-BN, a Bengali mathematical reasoning benchmark with 9,000 perturbated samples, evaluates six LLMs to assess robustness and reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Discourse-Aware Policy Analysis with Argumentation: A Hybrid LLM-Symbolic Framework for Disaster Governance
item.description: Framework combines LLMs with symbolic reasoning to extract and classify arguments from policy documents, revealing implicit tensions between deliberative and managerial frames.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Finding the Right Tables and Columns: A Benchmark and Corpus-Adaptive Embeddings for SQL Schema Retrieval
item.description: A corpus-adaptive embedding method improves SQL schema retrieval performance, achieving 75.6% recall@10 for identifying relevant tables and columns in large databases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Meta-Learning Preferences for Multilingual LLM Alignment
item.description: Meta-learning framework transfers multilingual preference data to align LLMs in low-resource languages with minimal target-language samples.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluation Ability Does Not Imply Optimization Utility: LLM-as-a-Judge Signals in Closed-Loop Table Recognition
item.description: Study finds LLM-as-a-judge evaluation ability insufficient for optimization signals in iterative table recognition.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A POS Tier Is the Key to Automated Annotation for Low-Resource Language Documentation: Neural Interlinear Glossing for Irabu, a Southern Ryukyuan Language
item.description: Part-of-speech tagging cuts required glossed data by half for automated annotation of endangered languages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GFlowRL: Scaling Distribution-Matching RL to Large Language Models
item.description: GFlowRL eliminates the partition network from GFlowNets using Monte Carlo estimation, enabling stable distribution-matching RL scaling to large language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
item.description: On-policy distillation guides LLM student training through exploration, but student-teacher mismatch and length-gaming pathologies emerge; advantage clipping and compression regulations mitigate these issues.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Exploring Post-Training Alignment of Small Language Models for Biomedical Data-to-Text Generation: A Case Study of Medication Leaflet
item.description: Small language models trained with GRPO alignment outperformed proprietary models like GPT-5 on biomedical data-to-text generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Rubrics Change: Cross-Rubric Generalization for Critical Thinking Essay Scoring
item.description: Trait-based LLM fine-tuning improves automated essay scoring generalization to unseen rubrics, outperforming GPT models in some settings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Live Gurbani Tracking: A Benchmark and Reference System for Captioning Sikh Kirtan
item.description: Researchers introduce a benchmark and reference system for live captioning of Sikh Kirtan using closed-vocabulary scripture matching, achieving 57.9% frame accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DevicesWorld: Benchmarking Cross-Device Agents in Heterogeneous Environments
item.description: DevicesWorld benchmark contains 6,140 cross-device tasks integrating mobile, desktop, and IoT environments; frontier LLM agents achieve 12.5% success at best.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MyAG: A Graph-Based Framework for Designing and Analyzing Composable LLM Agent Systems
item.description: MyAG is a graph-based framework using three graph abstractions to design and analyze composable LLM agent systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cost-Pragmatic Quality Gating and Selection-Fusion Multi-Model Combiners for BioASQ Phases A+ and B
item.description: BioASQ system uses cost-pragmatic quality-gating for selective re-retrieval and decomposes multi-model ensemble into selection-fusion components.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Graded Entity-Familiarity Readouts in Language Models: Polish Adaptation, Cross-Language Robustness, and Refusal Steering
item.description: Language models assess entity familiarity via neural activations; Polish-adapted models better track popularity; familiarity probes control refusal behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Memory as a Controlled Process: Learned Adaptive Memory Management for LLM Agents
item.description: MemCon framework learns to adaptively manage LLM agent memory operations, improving performance by up to 15.2% across multiple benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Analogical Deep Research: Retrieving and Integrating Historical Analogies for Foresight Analysis
item.description: Researchers develop CANA framework to help LLM agents identify historical analogies by analyzing underlying causal mechanisms rather than surface features.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Evolving Agent Harnesses via Gated Semantic Quality-Diversity
item.description: Method separates proposing harness changes from crediting improvements using deterministic measurement, achieving 9-15.5pp gains across seven tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Test Oracle Problem in Synthetic LLM-as-Judge Corpora: Disappearance, Distortion and a Validation Protocol
item.description: Study reveals LLM-generated synthetic judge corpora lack mechanical verification, enabling false bias measurements from parameter truncation errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-supervised Speech Comparison for L2 Phone, Rhythm, and Intonation Scoring
item.description: DTW-based approach using self-supervised WavLM representations exceeds human agreement on L2 phonetic scoring and enables text-free rhythm and intonation assessment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Post-Training Shifts Confidence: A Three-Stage Analysis of How SFT, RL, and OPD Shape Pre-, Intra-, and Post-CoT Calibration
item.description: Post-training methods affect model confidence differently across reasoning stages; position-aware confidence use improves answer aggregation and early stopping performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SPyCE: Skill-Policy Co-evolution for Multimodal Agents
item.description: SPyCE framework simultaneously updates hierarchical skill libraries and policy during RL training for multimodal agents on tool-use tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Automatic Differentiation from Scratch: How PyTorch Computes Gradients in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: Paper traces PyTorch's automatic differentiation for Physics-Informed Neural Networks, which require computing physics derivatives and parameter gradients simultaneously.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Backbone Backpropagation: A Decoupled Strategy for Efficient Transfer Learning
item.description: Method decouples feature extraction from classifier optimization in transfer learning, reducing training time and computational cost while maintaining performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Explainable Artificial Intelligence: Roles, Architectures, Evaluation, and Open Challenges
item.description: Survey of Federated Explainable AI combining privacy-preserving collaborative learning with model transparency and interpretability mechanisms.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] What Your Model Threw Away and Why You'll Want It Back: Masking, Fingerprinting, and Privacy from Discarded Geometry
item.description: Study develops framework to identify hidden symmetries in ML models with Lie group actions for privacy and fingerprinting applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Targeted Recovery of Weight-Space Mechanisms From Neural Networks
item.description: Targeted parameter decomposition extracts interpretable transformer components for specific inputs while reducing computational requirements to 7% of prior methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty-Aware Sequential Decision Rules for Event-Triggered LLM Invocation in Streaming Systems
item.description: Risk-based framework optimizes when to invoke expensive LLMs in streaming pipelines, with proven optimality of trigger policies and sublinear regret.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TSSM: Triaxial State Space Model for Global Station Weather Forecasting with Temporal-Variable-Historical Modeling
item.description: TSSM weather forecasting model incorporates period-aligned historical data to achieve 10% accuracy and 61% extreme-event prediction improvements on Weather-5K dataset.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Disentangling Knowledge States with Ability and Proficiency Modeling for Knowledge Tracing
item.description: Knowledge tracing method decomposes student learning into ability and proficiency phases to better predict student performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STKAN: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Spatio-Temporal Forecasting
item.description: STKAN applies Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks to spatio-temporal traffic forecasting via Taylor-polynomial modules, achieving competitive performance through improved nonlinear approximation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Hybrid Mamba for Audio-Visual Navigation
item.description: Samba, a Mamba-based architecture for audio-visual navigation, improves performance 11.3% over prior state-of-the-art by replacing GRUs and CNN components.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CoDiffGRN: Rethinking Gene Regulatory Network Inference via the BEELINE-KGC Benchmark and Co-evolutionary Discrete Diffusion
item.description: CoDiffGRN applies co-evolutionary discrete diffusion to enhance gene regulatory network inference with inductive generalization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ShortOPD: Recovering Pruned LLMs with Short-to-Long On-Policy Distillation
item.description: ShortOPD uses short-to-long on-policy distillation with suffix detection to recover pruned LLM performance on free-form generation tasks.
